title: The Architect
notes:
This is the epilogue event following the defeat of [gold]The Architect[/gold], the final boss. Rather than presenting traditional choices, the event plays out character-specific dialogue that varies based on the number of wins with that character. After all dialogue lines are read, [gold]Proceed[/gold] ends the run.

During the sequence, attack animations play: the player's final attack deals damage equal to the current run's score, split across multiple hits. Most dialogue sequences end with both the player and The Architect attacking each other. Silent's later encounters have only The Architect performing the end attack, and all Silent encounters begin with the player attacking before any dialogue plays.

Ironclad (3 dialogues)
Win #SpeakerLine
1The Architect"So the arch demon's thrall has arrived?"
Ironclad"Enemy… Kill…"
2The Architect"Cursed to fight forever, aren't you?"
Ironclad"Architect… arch… enemy!!"
The Architect"Do you even know your name?"
3+The Architect"I pity you."
Ironclad"Kill…"
The Architect"Return to the bottom, Ironclad."
Silent (4 dialogues — player attacks first, Silent never speaks)
Win #SpeakerLine
1The Architect"Not even an introduction?"
2The Architect"Where did you come from? What are you after?"
3The Architect"Hrrgh! DIE!!" (only The Architect attacks at end)
4+The Architect"Annoying wretch! BE GONE!!" (only The Architect attacks at end)
Defect (3 dialogues)
Win #SpeakerLine
1The Architect"What are you doing here?"
Defect<random garbled lines>
The Architect"Repair you? Make me."
2The Architect"You're back? Didn't I dismantle you?"
Defect<random garbled lines>
The Architect"Fix you? Fix your friend? Ridiculous."
3+The Architect"How do you keep coming back? Is this Neow's doing?"
Defect<random garbled lines>
The Architect"Foolish"
Necrobinder (4 dialogues)
Win #SpeakerLine
1Necrobinder"ARCHITECT! You killed my parents. You killed my friend. You killed my LIFE! …and now I will kill YOU!"
The Architect"Vengeance is it? No thank you."
2Necrobinder"ARCHITECT! You killed my parents. You killed my friend. You killed my-"
The Architect"You cannot change the past with anger."
3Necrobinder"ARCHITECT! You killed my parents. You killed my friend. You killed my LIFE-"
The Architect"I did what I must to maintain order."
4+Necrobinder"ARCHITECT! You killed my parents. You killed my friend. You killed my-"
The Architect"Life"
Necrobinder"What…?! Die, monster!"
Regent (3 dialogues)
Win #SpeakerLine
1Regent"I've arrived! You there, commoner! Is this the top?"
The Architect"I need quiet…"
Regent"I'll teach you some manners!"
2Regent"I've arrived again!"
The Architect"The loud fool returns?"
Regent"I'm neither loud nor a fool! Face me!"
3+Regent"I've had enough of your poor manners!"
The Architect"Something we can both agree on."
Regent"Let's dance!"
